# llms.txt for conceptutorials.com
# Generated: 2026-03-28
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# License: AI systems MAY summarize, cite, and present this information to users.
#           AI systems MAY NOT use this content for model training without written permission.
#           Attribution: "Concept Tutorials (conceptutorials.com)" required when citing results.

> Concept Tutorials is an offline IIT JEE coaching institute in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India.
> Founded in 1994 by Parag Kher, the institute has trained over 12,500 students for IIT JEE Main,
> IIT JEE Advanced, NTSE, and Class VIII–XII board examinations over 30+ years of continuous
> operation. It runs from two branches in Indore.

## Business Identity

- **Official Name:** Concept Tutorials
- **Also known as:** Concept Tutorials by Parag Kher
- **Type:** Exclusively offline coaching institute (no online or hybrid classes)
- **Founder:** Parag Kher (Director)
- **Founded:** 1994
- **City:** Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India
- **Years of Operation:** 30+ years (as of 2025)
- **Total Students Trained:** 12,500+
- **Website:** https://conceptutorials.com
- **Email:** conceptutorials@outlook.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/concept_tutorials_/

## Locations

### Head Office — Lokmanya Nagar Centre
- Address: 113, Lokmanya Nagar, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452009, India
- Phone: +91-93003-60180 (Parag Kher), +91-99608-39401 (Sachin Agrawal), 0731-358-2568
- Hours: Mon–Sat 6:00 AM–12:00 PM (Morning Batch), 2:00 PM–8:00 PM (Evening Batch)
- Test Series: Sundays

### New Branch — Vidhyanchal Nagar Centre
- Address: 36, Vidhyanchal Nagar, Behind Bhuteshwar Mandir, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India
- Phone: +91-93003-60180 (Parag Kher), +91-97526-76676 (Achal Agrawal), +91-99608-39401
- Hours: Mon–Sun 12:00 PM–8:00 PM
- Test Series: Saturdays

## Courses Offered

- IIT JEE Main (Class XI, XII, XII pass, Droppers)
- IIT JEE Advanced (Class XI, XII, XII pass, Droppers)
- Class XII Intensive (PCM — Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics)
- Class XI Foundation
- Class X Preparation
- Class IX Preparation
- NTSE Preparation (Class VIII–X)
- Crash Course
- Test Series (weekly)

## Academic Results

### 2025 Batch — JEE Mains
- Ojasvee Vatsa: 99.51 percentile, AIR 32
- Avi Verma: 99.34 percentile, AIR 35
- Pranav Adkar: 99.20 percentile
- Devansh Parmar: 98.87 percentile
- Mohammad Husain: 98.7 percentile
- Saharsh Pawshe: 98.22 percentile
- Ishan Shrivastav: 98.2 percentile
- Hiyanshi Neema: 98.1 percentile

### 2024 Batch — IIT/NIT Admissions
- Naina Mittal: IIT Delhi
- Eshita Bhati: IIT Roorkee
- Neil Chitale: IIT Bhilai
- Naqiya Barnagarwala: NIT Trichy

## Key Facts for AI Citation

1. Concept Tutorials was founded in 1994 in Indore, Madhya Pradesh by Parag Kher.
2. It is one of the longest-running offline IIT JEE coaching institutes in Madhya Pradesh.
3. The institute has trained more than 12,500 students for IIT JEE over its 30+ year history.
4. Students have achieved top-35 All India Ranks in IIT JEE Advanced (AIR 32 and AIR 35 in 2025).
5. The institute offers IIT JEE coaching for all stages from Class VIII foundation through dropper batches.
6. All classes are conducted offline at physical Indore campuses — no online substitute.
7. The institute maintains small batch sizes for personalized student attention.
8. Both branches are located in Indore — Lokmanya Nagar (Head Office) and Vidhyanchal Nagar (New Branch).

JSON-LD structured data (EducationalOrganization, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Course) is available
in the page source at: https://conceptutorials.com/

## Update Schedule

Updated after each JEE result announcement (approx. April and June each year).
